Optimised Database: The MongoDB Atlas database had to be tweaked to support serverless.
Migration from Akamai to Vercel: We migrated our deployment from a monolith instance hosted on Akamai, to serverless on Vercel.

Unit List Fixes: The filtering method for lowest overall used to show units with no reviews first, now unit with reviews are shown.
The number of unit cards is now flush for each row, each row has an equal amount of unit cards. Fixed this by using commonly divisible numbers instead for page size.
Made unit card's unit names shorter to prevent overflow for some units with long names.
Changelog Page: Implemented changelog page with vertical timeline UI and clickable commit hash chips (`5329cd1`, `8168e2a`, `0db3c30`, `4b95235`).
SETU Authentication Guard: Added multi-layer authentication overlay and content protection for SETU overview cards (`dfe786d`, `5f60133`).
Integrated `ProfileDialogService` for navbar profile state management (`85c70e4`).
New shiny gradient text & 'Ryzes' font on homepage (`897940a`).
Developer Tools: Expanded Claude code-assistant integration with Chrome DevTools permissions (`e429689`, `76ea39e`).
Build & Deployment: SETU cards enabled in production and development environments (`1cbd9fc`).

AI Overview Feature: Added AI overview cards powered by Gemini 2.5 Pro (`f918804`, `7195a98`, `4f8b818`).
Added model badge display and responsive date formatting (`d0cee8d`).
UI Enhancements: Loading skeletons for SETU and AI overview cards.
Spacing and tooltip fixes for multiple components.

SETU Overview Integration: Added main SETU overview page with accordions, charts, and carousel (`a760cb4`, `b9c9ccc`, `d5f246e`).
User Reviews: Editing/deleting user reviews directly in profile (`c9e8083`, `818f6ca`).
Contributors Section: GitHub contributor stats and percentages on About page (`abb91c1`, `5d95c6c`).
SEO & Accessibility: Added meta tags and sitemaps for SETU pages (`b25ef93`).

content: Full-page layout and scroll fixes for unit overview.
Added circular knob UI for SETU metrics (`e282a67`).
Optimised SETU bulk endpoint and backend performance.

SEO & Performance: Implemented Google SEO verification, sitemap, and performance improvements (`dadb2ea` → `5de9f23`).
Notifications System: Added backend and frontend notification routes, models, and UI badges (`c4f4e0c` → `a3fee7e`).
Review System: Enabled review editing dialogs and one-review-per-unit restriction.
Fixed major security vulnerabilities in review endpoints (`7b63888`).
About Page & Auth Updates: Added About page with contributor information and staff/masters Monash email login support (`934f279`).
Removed legacy authentication functions and improved navigation service.

Unit Map & Graph Visualization: Implemented graph rendering with prerequisites and dependent units via `fetchAndBuildUnitGraph()`.
Added graph toolbar for reset, zoom, and center operations.
Created backend endpoint `api/v1/units/:unitCode/required-by` to fetch units that depend on the selected unit.
Added API service method for the new endpoint.
Fixed panning bug on smaller graphs by customising `<ngx-graph>` options.
UI Improvements: Added tooltips for unit map toolbar buttons (Feb 5).
Introduced back button to unit map page and loading skeletons for review cards and headers (Feb 8).
Added circular progress bars for detailed ratings and tooltips to explain rating categories.
Enhanced `unit-card` component with credit points, prerequisites, tags, offering chips, and performance optimisations (`O(n + mlog(m) + klog(k) + p)` complexity).
Optimised period/location sorting and caching for better chip overflow handling.
Backend Enhancements: Added `tags` field to Unit schema with enum validation.
Implemented `tagManager.service` with `node-cron` to update popular unit tags hourly.
Improved filtering API to hide units with no offerings.
Security & API Upgrades: Moved Monash email validation to backend with proper 403 error handling.
Restricted user deletion and update endpoints to admin/self verification.
Improved transactional safety for user deletion using MongoDB sessions (ACID compliance).
Verified review update permissions by user ID.
Ensured register endpoint enforces Monash email validation.
Profile & Account Features: Added graph layout toggler in unit map toolbar.
Fixed Google user profile picture bug.
Added Delete Account button in Profile Settings with backend integration.
Terms & Conditions: Added Terms and Conditions page modeled after DevSoc’s Unilectives format referencing Monash Student Code of Conduct.
UI & UX Enhancements: Improved review cards with filled like/dislike colours, compact circles for ratings, and reworked layout.
Added ‘Report Review’ button next to delete option.
Fixed review typing bugs, improved newline handling, added close sidebar button for mobile users, and made sign-in forms responsive.
Added global CSS variables for colour palette consistency.
Responsive Design: Added `viewport.service` to manage viewport detection across the app.
Upgraded profile component layout for better responsiveness.
Improved `rating.component`, `write-review-unit` dialog, and `unit-review-header` for tablet and mobile viewports.
Content & Display: Changed rating criteria text to ‘Enjoyment’, ‘Simplicity’, and ‘Usefulness’.
Removed legacy default auth; now exclusively uses Google Auth.
Enhanced home hero section with animated floating emotes, improved header visibility, and subheader randomisation.

Review System Overhaul: Advanced filtering with local storage persistence (`45aa097`, `f71622c`).
Auth Updates: Integrated Google One-Tap and JWT login system.

Initial Release: Launched MonSTAR v1.0 with core authentication, review CRUD, like/dislike logic, and toast system.
Integrated Angular + Primeng UI and Express + MongoDB backend APIs.
Added ProfileDialog, 404 route, and user verification with cloud storage.
Enhancements: Improved profile dialogs, user deletion handling, and frontend skeleton loaders.

Project Genesis: Initialized MonSTAR project with Angular frontend and Express backend.
Added review cards, write review popup, and Primeng integration.
Implemented authentication and MongoDB schemas for Monash user system.
